title: Union mixing array types and object shapes
description: mion union.spec.ts 'Union Mixed' — arrays and objects in the same union; the OR-chain dispatches on shape (Array.isArray vs object typeof).
pureType: createValidate<string[] | number[] | boolean[] | {a: string; aa: boolean} | {b: number} | {c: bigint; aa: 'string'}>()
schema:
Validate(
  RT.union([
    RT.array(RT.string()),
    RT.array(RT.number()),
    RT.array(RT.boolean()),
    RT.object({a: RT.string(), aa: RT.boolean()}),
    RT.object({b: RT.number()}),
    RT.object({c: RT.bigint(), aa: RT.literal('string')}),
  ])
)
